pages.text: Appears in:$(li)Kamen Rider Zeztz (2025, TV show)$(br2)Equipped alongside the $(l:zeztz/devices/armor)Zeztz armor$(/l) to transform into $(l:zeztz/riders/dawn)Kamen Rider Dawn
Obtained by right-clicking the $(l:zeztz/arsenal/breakam_dawn_taiken)Breakam Dawn (Taiken Mode)$(/l) without any foot armor
